problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: The key to What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient is Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI — specifically Default mode network — which would help 280,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
